name: Leaderboard
description: Score-based leaderboard with categories, rankings, and admin editing
details: Ranked leaderboard table with score submission, category filtering, medal badges for top 3, and admin score editing. Uses useQuery with ordering for real-time rankings and useMutations for CRUD.
instructions: All files are co-located under src/features/leaderboard/ so relative imports within the feature work as-is
